settings.title: Command Runner
settings.description: Configure command slots. The first widget uses slot 1, the second widget uses slot 2, and so on.

slotCount.label: Slot Count
slotCount.description: How many independent command slots are available.

slot.title: Slot {index}
slot.description: Used by widget #{index} in the bar.

command.label: Command
command.description: Shell command to execute. The command stdout is shown in the bar.

clickCommand.label: Click Command
clickCommand.description: Optional command executed when this slot is clicked.

shellPath.label: Shell Path
shellPath.description: Interpreter used to execute the command.

refreshInterval.label: Refresh Interval
refreshInterval.description: How often the command reruns automatically, in seconds.

maxTextLength.label: Maximum Text Length
maxTextLength.description: Start marquee scrolling when the text exceeds this length.

marqueeEnabled.label: Enable Marquee
marqueeEnabled.description: Scroll the text when it exceeds the configured maximum length.

color.label: Color
color.description: Choose theme color or a custom color.
